title: grassy tender australian beans bake
description: a paleo-inspired brunch dish featuring baked beans and lardons, with a grassy and tender texture
instructions: saute the lardons in a large cast-iron pan over medium heat until browned, about 5 minutes.
add the soaked and drained haricot beans to the pan and stir to combine with the lardons.
transfer the bean and lardon mixture to a baking dish and cover with foil.
bake for 30 minutes, then remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 15 minutes, or until the beans are tender and the liquid has thickened.
